title: Duracell Specialty N Alkaline Battery 1,5V, pack of 2 (E90 / LR1), Designed for use in Flashlights, Calculators, & Bike Lights
features: Duracell Specialty alkaline N batteries - Up to 40% more power (vs IEC portable light test minimum average duration for LR1 size Results may vary by device and usage patterns)
Duracell Specialty batteries are available in a variety of sizes: J, N, AAAA, MN21, MN11, MN28
Duracell Specialty alkaline N batteries are suitable for use in flashlights, calculators and bike lights
Reliable batteries for your specialty devices
description: Product Description Duracell Specialty alkaline N batteries - up to 40% more power (vs. IEC portable light test minimum average duration for LR1 size. Results may vary by device and usage patterns) for your devices. Duracell Specialty batteries have up to 5 years of in-storage guarantee so you can be confident these alkaline batteries will be ready when you need them. They are suitable for use in flashlights, calculators and bike lights. Safety Warning Attention: Check the correct polarity (+/-). Do not disassemble, reload or throw into fire. Do not mix old and new batteries, different brands or types. Keep out of reach of children. Do not swallow. If swallowed, consult a doctor immediately. Box Contains 1 x Duracell Specialty Type N Alkaline Battery, pack of 2 See more
